segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translation.text: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: What happened when the snake charmer began to play jazz?

translation.text: 耍蛇人开始演奏爵士乐时发生了什么？

segments.text: As we had had a long walk through one of the markets of Old Delhi, we stopped at a square to have a rest.

translation.text: 我们在旧德里的一个市场里走了很长一段路，便在一处广场停下来休息。

segments.text: After a time, we noticed a snake charmer with two large baskets at the other side of the square, so we went to have a look at him.

translation.text: 过了一会儿，我们注意到广场另一边有个耍蛇人，旁边放着两只大篮子，于是走过去看他表演。

segments.text: As soon as he saw us, he picked up a long pipe which was covered with coins and opened one of the baskets.

translation.text: 他一看见我们，就拿起一根镶满硬币的长笛，打开其中一只篮子。

segments.text: When he began to play a tune, we had our first glimpse of the snake.

translation.text: 他开始吹奏一支曲子时，我们第一次看见了蛇。

segments.text: It rose out of the basket and began to follow the movements of the pipe.

translation.text: 蛇从篮子里探出身子，开始随着笛子的摆动而扭动。

segments.text: We were very much surprised when the snake charmer suddenly began to play jazz and modern pop songs.

translation.text: 耍蛇人突然开始演奏爵士乐和现代流行歌曲时，我们非常惊讶。

segments.text: The snake, however, continued to dance slowly.

translation.text: 然而，蛇仍然缓慢地舞动着。

segments.text: It obviously could not tell the difference between Indian music and jazz.

translation.text: 显然，它分辨不出印度音乐和爵士乐。
